name: Golden Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton Recipe Secrets Golden-Herb with Lemon Recipe Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip chicken in egg, then coat with flour.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Brown the chicken for 4 minutes, turning once.
4. Stir in the soup mix blended with water and arrange lemon slices on top of the chicken.
5. Bring to a boil, then simmer covered for 10 minutes or until the sauce is slightly thickened and the chicken is cooked through.
6. Serve chicken and lemon over hot rice, spooning sauce over the chicken.
